Through original programming, documentaries, and expert-led discussions, MHTN aims to increase awareness, provide valuable information, and encourage open conversations about mental well-being.

programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Hope and Health With Mathew Embry
programme.desc: Retired anesthesiologist Bill Code about living with multiple sclerosis for nearly three decades. Diagnosed in 1996, Bill shares how his medical background and personal experience shaped his long-term approach to managing MS. The conversation explores hyperbaric oxygen therapy, omega-3 supplementation, the microvascular theory of MS, and the role of blood flow and cellular energy in neurological health.

programme.desc: Steve and Clay Newcomb visit Jordan Budd for a guided Nebraska whitetail trip.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: From hunting deer and pheasants in South Dakota to a big Alberta whitetail Melissa puts in her time.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect Africa's wildlife from the threats of poaching and human-wildlife conflict.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join Alli and Adriana in bringing you entertaining, informative, fun-filled shows.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Following Jim's footsteps to the farthest corner of the world in search of giant Marco Polo sheep.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers in two different districts in northern Michigan check on hunters and respond to emergencies on the opening day of the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: The Sub gun that almost replaced the Thompson Sub Machine Gun.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: There's some abilities that can't be taught.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Fly-fishing in beautiful Montana with Veterans and Project Healing Waters.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: JT goes on the hunt for big bass in Palm Bay, home to some of the greatest fisheries in Florida.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: It's wild fishing action in real time as the In-Fisherman staff explores predator-prey relationships, highlighting fishing for smallmouths targeting gobies on the Door County waters of Lake Michigan; focusing on the importance of shad on big rivers for blue catfish; knocking on the woody lairs where panfish hide to catch largemouth bass.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Taking viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: Joined by Ed Sambey, aka Big Fish Ed, this week, The Two Conchs Crew deep drops for queenfish and tilefish.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Tiffany Greene is a sports commentator who carries forward the legacy of her remarkable parents, whose accomplishments and guidance paved the way for her own success.

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Florida's Space Coast is a great place to catch snook and Captain Peter Deeks knows just where to find them.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy eats his way through the best local seafood dishes in Portland, OR and Chula Vista, CA.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Fishing captains search the coastal waters of southeastern U.S.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: Let's Fish TV is a weekly look at fishing in the Southern U.S. The program features both fresh and saltwater fishing for most southern species, and gives tips on where and how to catch the most popular game fish in the region.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: It's wild fishing action in real time as the In-Fisherman staff explores predator-prey relationships, highlighting fishing for smallmouths targeting gobies on the Door County waters of Lake Michigan; focusing on the importance of shad on big rivers for blue catfish; knocking on the woody lairs where panfish hide to catch largemouth bass.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straight forward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platform for anyone to be successful in bass fishing.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland starts by catching a few bass on frogs, then locates deeper schools on points and shoals, landing 2-5 lb. fish on worms and chatterbaits.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Drifting and jigging with Steelshad bladebaits targeting Lake Erie walleye.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: From hunting deer and pheasants in South Dakota to a big Alberta whitetail Melissa puts in her time.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Searching for the toughest whitetails in the world to hunt.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott Leysath is targeting saltwater and freshwater fish in this action-packed episode of Dead Meat! Joined by a few familiar faces, Leysath is fishing for California Halibut off the coast of Santa Cruz with his pal, Kevin Phillips.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Capt. Don Dingman teaches children the tricks of angling in world-class fisheries.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every service-connected disabled Veteran has the stability, dignity, and opportunity they deserve.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Clients chasing gobblers with Jokers Wild Outdoors WA.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: The early teal season in the south represents the kick off to the chase we all love. DUTV Co-Host Doug Larsen joins Higdon Outdoors Brook Richard and enthusiastic Louisiana DU Volunteer Jared Seringe for a taste .

programme.title: Stompin' groundz

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl

programme.title: Small Town Hunting
programme.desc: Kicking off deer season in Kentucky with our buddy Peanut is a ritual with the crew and we are not missing it!

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original - an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken - his skills extend far beyond wild pigs. From giant whitetails in the Midwest to red stag in New Zealand.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: Though it has "weekend" in the title, this show discusses the week ahead in addition to offering suggestions for what to do on Saturday and Sunday. Weather Channel meteorologists go beyond the elements outside and into the realm of lifestyle tips. Each host has a recurring segment on "Weekend Recharge," which includes helping parents get a fresh start to each day and explaining how the weather is expected to impact the weekend's scheduled sports action.

programme.title: Timber Titans

programme.title: Top 100 Weather Moments
programme.desc: Counting down notable weather moments.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: A freak weather system strands two sailors on a lifeless Mexican desert island with no food or water and staving off death by exposure; a hiker with a broken femur fights for his life in the middle of Joshua Tree National Park's punishing heat.

programme.title: Could You Survive? With Creek Stewart
programme.desc: Three teenagers find themselves stranded on a remote northern Canadian island for three weeks, facing death by starvation as winter closes in; a quick hike in Utah's Bryce Canyon suddenly turns into a four-day struggle for survival.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods
programme.desc: Surviving a natural disaster on Cutoff Island in Florida with a tampon fire cigar and a duct tape cot.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods
programme.desc: Using primitive skills like a zero-gravity bow drill and one-tree shelter, Creek teaches how to live like cavemen in Cave Country, KY; also learn to navigate through a bat-infested cave system to find food and water.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods
programme.desc: Creek and three pals repel down a cliff into Kentucky's Red River wilderness and are faced with surviving with just one arm.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: The Peters crew grinds through some of the biggest logs of the season, while old iron and thick fog threaten to shut them down; up north, after a two-year drought, Freya Logging battles relentless rain as fall takes hold of the community forest.

programme.title: Uncharted Adventure
programme.desc: Exploring the Everglades, spear hunting invasive fish and planting coral are just a few stops on Mike's adventure through Southern Florida.

programme.title: Uncharted Adventure
programme.desc: Mike surrounds himself with cultural experiences, gorgeous landscapes, forgotten hideouts, and even a pack of sharks in Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Uncharted Adventure
programme.desc: Mike explores incredible rock formations, treks across unbelievable landscapes and plummets from towering plateaus in the ancient sands of Utah.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Police body cam footage captures the rescue of a mother and her four young children from Tropical Storm Imelda near Houston; a mother in a small town near Little Rock, Ark., tries in vain to save all nine of her children from an EF4 twister.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Two friends in Key West, Florida use Facebook Live to broadcast their harrowing experience aboard their boat during Hurricane Irma; storm chasers capture rare footage of a deadly tornado in Mississippi on Easter Sunday, 2020.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: During a tornado outbreak in Oklahoma, a young man races to save his cousin who has autism, trapped in a house just as a twister is about to slam into it; a former roadie for the Grateful Dead uses a garden hose to save his house from a wildfire.

programme.title: High Arctic Haulers
programme.desc: A massive flood threatens cargo and the Sedna; Taiga makes a ship-to-ship transfer.

programme.title: High Arctic Haulers
programme.desc: The Sealift fights to reach Canada's most northern town, Grise Fjord.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: Though it has "weekend" in the title, this show discusses the week ahead in addition to offering suggestions for what to do on Saturday and Sunday. Weather Channel meteorologists go beyond the elements outside and into the realm of lifestyle tips. Each host has a recurring segment on "Weekend Recharge," which includes helping parents get a fresh start to each day and explaining how the weather is expected to impact the weekend's scheduled sports action.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: A freak deluge and a low bridge trap three women in a deadly flash flood; 783 runners trek 156 miles across the Sahara desert for the toughest foot race on Earth; playing catch while falling to Earth at terminal velocity.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral
programme.desc: The coast of Italy is hit with a monster hail storm; Tropical Storm Imelda stalls, dumping a ton of rain on Texas; a city street is transformed into a raging river when São Paulo, Brazil, is pummeled with more than three days of rain.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: Sonny hunts for a shortcut across town after a runaway van smashes through a wall and into the path of a full-speed truck; the crew from Herb's hurries to save a load of pharmaceuticals before it freezes.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: Freezing rain scatters Gary's team, forcing him to work solo to open the continent's busiest border crossing; in Windsor, Brad, Eric and crew fear a tragedy when they untangle a sedan badly crushed by a semi.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401
programme.desc: A storm sweeps across the province, sending heavy rescue crews scrambling; in Hamilton, Kevin fights to clear a wreck in time for the plows to get through.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: The Peters crew grinds through some of the biggest logs of the season, while old iron and thick fog threaten to shut them down; up north, after a two-year drought, Freya Logging battles relentless rain as fall takes hold of the community forest.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: Four logging companies in British Columbia fight extreme weather and terrain to ethically harvest one of Canada's most vital resources.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Wreckers
programme.desc: Charlie rescues a family trapped in a live lane of traffic; the Stauffer's Utah crew battles to upright a rollover pinned between moving traffic and open water; a sinkhole swallows a 200,000-pound excavator.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Wreckers
programme.desc: Two separate crashes in Utah spur the Stauffer's crew to perform a pair of dramatic recoveries; Bad Grandpa goes for a plunge when the Mountain Recovery team attempts a daring job on a raging river.

programme.title: Timber Titans
programme.desc: Four logging companies in British Columbia fight extreme weather and terrain to ethically harvest one of Canada's most vital resources.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: This gripping true-crime series examines spellbinding events where weather played a central role in solving or covering up the crime, featuring experts and forensic meteorologists.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: During Hurricane Harvey, realtor Crystal McDowell vanished en route to her ex-husband's home. Despite the storm's chaos, investigators pursued leads through floods and tragedy. Her car was found in a Motel 6 lot, likely abandoned by the killer. Days later, ex-husband Steve McDowell confessed to murdering her as Texas reeled from the disaster.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: Stephanie Bruner vanished after telling her husband Dale she needed a walk. Days later, her body was found in the icy Blue River frozen, beaten, and strangled. Police uncovered a web of secrets: a failed affair, financial stress, and a retracted restraining order against Dale. With no forensic evidence, Dale's violent past and motive led to his indictment eight months later.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: In 1992, two masked men shot Ward Maracle during a robbery in snowy rural Canada. A quick-thinking detective preserved a shoeprint using molten sulfur, capturing a perfect Nike Air size 8 imprint. A tip led to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue-local criminals. Matched shoes sealed the case. Both were convicted, and Ward survived, with justice preserved by the cold.

programme.title: Prospectors
programme.desc: The Busses battle hail; the Dorrises dodge cave-ins to unearth fluorite; Dwayne's friend brings newbie luck; Amanda must make a tough decision about her future.

programme.title: Prospectors

programme.title: Spies in Disguise

programme.title: Home in Oklahoma
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, after the death of ranch owner Sam Talbot, niece Jan (Carol Hughes) learns with dismay that her uncle has left the ranch to 12-year-old Duke (Lanny Rees), a ward of Sam's foreman. Roy clashes with reporter Connie Edwards (Dale Evans), who writes an article about the suspicion of foul play, but soon Roy must protect Duke from mysterious attacks.

programme.title: Idaho
programme.desc: When the esteemed Judge John Grey (Harry Shannon) finds himself on trial for the robbery of a local bank, singing cowboy Roy Rogers (Roy Rogers) comes to his friend's aid. Rogers suspects a frame-up, and the trail of clues leads directly to the crafty Belle Bonner (Ona Munson), a woman whose disreputable saloon has recently sparked the judge's ire. To clear Grey's name, Rogers must convince the townspeople of his innocence -- and face off against Belle and her gunslinging henchmen.

programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

Hoping to rid the town of the farmers, the cowboys set fire to their camp, and a desperado murders a homesteader, but Dan refuses to allow them revenge. Joining a posse under a crooked sheriff, and with the help of singer Rita (Ann Dvorak) and a merchant, Dan forces a peaceful showdown between the factions.

programme.title: Salome
programme.desc: Princess Salome (Rita Hayworth) is the daughter of King Herod (Charles Laughton) of Galilee. Cast out after her affair with Caesar's nephew, Salome finds herself back in the kingdom of her father when she falls in love with Claudius (Stewart Granger), the commander of her father's army. Meanwhile, Salome's evil mother, Queen Herodias, is continually being condemned by John the Baptist, and plotting to use Salome as a tool to get the prophet executed.

programme.title: Murder, He Says
programme.desc: When a public opinion surveyor working in the mountain district town of Plainville goes missing, fellow surveyor Pete Marshall (Fred MacMurray) is sent as his replacement. Visiting the hillbilly family of Mamie Fleagle (Marjorie Main), Pete begins to suspect with horror that she and her two sons have murdered the surveyor. Pete then comes to believe that Mamie is slowly poisoning wealthy Grandma Fleagle, who has put a vital clue to her fortune in a nonsensical embroidered sampler.

programme.title: The Gay Cavalier
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) and Pancho (Martin Garralaga) try to help an unhappy bride.

programme.title: Little Big Horn
programme.desc: Captain Phillip Donlin (Lloyd Bridges) and his small troop must rush to reach Little Big Horn in order to warn General Custer of the Sioux attack that awaits him. As they race against time, and Donlin pushes them hard through an arduous and dangerous journey, the Sioux start taking out the soldiers one at a time. Meanwhile, Donlin also clashes with Lt. John Haywood (John Ireland), who Donlin knows is having an affair with his wife, Celie (Marie Windsor).

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Three brothers become outlaws after the Civil War, while a fourth sibling goes to work for the railroad.

programme.title: Seminole Uprising
programme.desc: An Army lieutenant (George Montgomery) is ordered to go after Florida Indians in Texas.

programme.title: Barabbas
programme.desc: Epic biblical tale about the criminal who was released by Pontius Pilate in preference to Jesus, prior to the Crucifixion. The action follows Barabbas after his lucky escape, his return to crime and his subsequent recapture and imprisonment in the sulfur mines. Based on the novel by Swedish writer Par Lagerkvist.

programme.title: Samson and Delilah
programme.desc: Samson (Victor Mature), the hero of the Israelites, wins the hand of a Philistine woman, Semadar (Angela Lansbury), in a contest of strength. When she is killed during a conflict on her wedding night, however, Samson becomes a hunted man whom the Philistines, including Semadar's sister, Delilah (Hedy Lamarr), want to punish. This becomes complicated, however, when Samson suddenly acquires God-given superpowers, and Delilah's true feelings for Samson surface.

programme.title: Little Big Horn
programme.desc: Captain Phillip Donlin (Lloyd Bridges) and his small troop must rush to reach Little Big Horn in order to warn General Custer of the Sioux attack that awaits him. As they race against time, and Donlin pushes them hard through an arduous and dangerous journey, the Sioux start taking out the soldiers one at a time. Meanwhile, Donlin also clashes with Lt. John Haywood (John Ireland), who Donlin knows is having an affair with his wife, Celie (Marie Windsor).

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes is consulted by a man who is concerned about the sudden strange behavior of his employer, who has taken to visiting a ruined crypt at nighttime, and bones are later discovered in his furnace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt prepares to trouble when a wounded outlaw winds up in Tombstone.

programme.title: The Gay Cavalier
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) and Pancho (Martin Garralaga) try to help an unhappy bride.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage. Join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt wants Morgan to quit gambling while he's ahead.

programme.title: Barabbas
programme.desc: Epic biblical tale about the criminal who was released by Pontius Pilate in preference to Jesus, prior to the Crucifixion. The action follows Barabbas after his lucky escape, his return to crime and his subsequent recapture and imprisonment in the sulfur mines. Based on the novel by Swedish writer Par Lagerkvist.

programme.title: Samson and Delilah
programme.desc: Samson (Victor Mature), the hero of the Israelites, wins the hand of a Philistine woman, Semadar (Angela Lansbury), in a contest of strength. When she is killed during a conflict on her wedding night, however, Samson becomes a hunted man whom the Philistines, including Semadar's sister, Delilah (Hedy Lamarr), want to punish. This becomes complicated, however, when Samson suddenly acquires God-given superpowers, and Delilah's true feelings for Samson surface.

programme.title: Escape From Fort Bravo
programme.desc: Captain Roper (William Holden) is the warden of a Union-run prison camp. A mysterious woman named Carla Forester (Eleanor Parker) arrives at the camp in order to free the Confederate prisoners, and things get complicated when Carla and the captain begin to fall for each other. In an effort to recapture the escaped prisoners, Roper has a run-in with a group of Mescalero Indians. In order to survive, he has to team up with his own prisoners to fight the Indians and wipe them out.

programme.title: Seminole Uprising
programme.desc: An Army lieutenant (George Montgomery) is ordered to go after Florida Indians in Texas.

programme.title: Ten Wanted Men
programme.desc: Rancher John Stewart (Randolph Scott) prefers to resolve problems without falling back on violent solutions. However, fellow cattleman Wick Campbell (Richard Boone) isn't so peaceful, and he hires a team of armed mercenaries, led by ruthless Frank Scavo (Leo Gordon), to rid him of any possible competition. After narrowly surviving an attack from Scavo and his men, Stewart has little choice but to fight back in order to save both his ranch and his family, including nephew Howie (Skip Homeier).

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: Union leader Cord McNally is protecting a routine gold shipment when his troops are attacked by Confederate forces. Not only does he lose the gold, but one of his strongest officers is killed in the raid. At the end of the Civil War, McNally learns that the raiders had help from the inside, and he vows to uncover the two traitors. After a chance encounter with one of the turncoats, McNally travels to the town of Rio Lobo and makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: The Robe
programme.desc: In this biblical epic, a drunk and disillusioned Roman, Marcellus Gallio (Richard Burton), wins Jesus' robe in a dice game after the crucifixion. Marcellus has never been a man of faith like his slave, Demetrius (Victor Mature), but when Demetrius escapes with the robe, Marcellus experiences disturbing visions and feels guilty of his actions. Convinced that destroying the robe will cure him, Marcellus sets out to find Demetrius -- and discovers his Christian faith along the way.

programme.title: Escape From Fort Bravo
programme.desc: Captain Roper (William Holden) is the warden of a Union-run prison camp. A mysterious woman named Carla Forester (Eleanor Parker) arrives at the camp in order to free the Confederate prisoners, and things get complicated when Carla and the captain begin to fall for each other. In an effort to recapture the escaped prisoners, Roper has a run-in with a group of Mescalero Indians. In order to survive, he has to team up with his own prisoners to fight the Indians and wipe them out.

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The detective tries to clear a man accused of patricide.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt wants Morgan to quit gambling while he's ahead.

programme.title: The Desert Trail
programme.desc: John Scott (John Wayne) is a rodeo rider, assisted by his buddy Kansas Charlie (Eddy Chandler). But while the duo is settling a debt with their promoter, Farnsworth (Henry Hall), thieves Pete (Al Ferguson) and Jim (Paul Fix) murder and rob Farnsworth and manage to pin the crimes on John and Charlie. The accused then flee, assume two new identities, take up with a shopkeeper named Anne (Mary Kornman) and set out to clear their names and bring the real killers to justice.

programme.title: The Robe
programme.desc: In this biblical epic, a drunk and disillusioned Roman, Marcellus Gallio (Richard Burton), wins Jesus' robe in a dice game after the crucifixion. Marcellus has never been a man of faith like his slave, Demetrius (Victor Mature), but when Demetrius escapes with the robe, Marcellus experiences disturbing visions and feels guilty of his actions. Convinced that destroying the robe will cure him, Marcellus sets out to find Demetrius -- and discovers his Christian faith along the way.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Westerner
programme.desc: A rancher (Tim McCoy) and his buddy (Joseph Sauers) scare rustlers out of business.

programme.title: Fort Osage
programme.desc: A scout (Rod Cameron) leads a wagon train through territory made hostile by a violated treaty.

programme.title: Ten Wanted Men
programme.desc: Rancher John Stewart (Randolph Scott) prefers to resolve problems without falling back on violent solutions. However, fellow cattleman Wick Campbell (Richard Boone) isn't so peaceful, and he hires a team of armed mercenaries, led by ruthless Frank Scavo (Leo Gordon), to rid him of any possible competition. programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock, a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans. As McLintock tries to juggle his various adversaries, his wife, who left him two years previously, suddenly returns. But she isn't interested in her husband -- she wants custody of their daughter.

programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Lawman Wyatt Earp (Burt Lancaster) and gunfighter John "Doc" Holliday (Kirk Douglas) find themselves together again in Tombstone, Ariz., despite the tumultuous history between them. Earp comes to Arizona on a mission to bring the Clayton clan to justice. Meanwhile, Holliday becomes incensed with the decision of Kate Fisher (Jo Van Fleet) to turn him down in favor of another gunfighter (John Ireland), ultimately leading Holliday to join Earp's side in a confrontation with the Claytons.

programme.title: The Story of Jacob and Joseph
programme.desc: Biblical dramas show Jacob (Keith Michell) and his twin, and Jacob's 11th son, Joseph (Tony Lo Bianco), who was sold by his brothers.

programme.title: Fort Osage
programme.desc: A scout (Rod Cameron) leads a wagon train through territory made hostile by a violated treaty.

programme.title: The Fighting Buckaroo
programme.desc: A cowboy (Charles Starrett) helps a friend who was framed for stealing cattle.

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: In the most dangerous assignment of his career, Holmes is asked to stop the marriage of Violet Merville to Baron Gruner.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: General store clerk Herbie Bates, is name assistant general manager of the Shady Rest by Kate, making Uncle Joe feel like he is being replaced.

programme.title: Emma: Natural Relief for Bloating, Constipation & Gut Imbalance
programme.desc: Tired of bloating or gut issues that won't go away?; discovering the root cause-and how Emma can help eliminate methane-producing archaea, reset digestion and restore balance naturally.

programme.title: Ministry - Your Words Have Power with Joyce Meyer
programme.desc: Your words hold incredible power; today, Joyce reveals how the things you say can impact your life in profound ways.

programme.title: Word of God Ministries
programme.desc: Pastor James McMenis and his wife Chrissy are dedicated to winning the lost to Jesus and making disciples of the saved. Their goal is to bring clarity to the Word of God, making it life-applicable to people everywhere.

programme.title: The Catholic Mass
programme.desc: The Heart of the nation Sunday mass brings the beauty and traditions of the Catholic faith.

programme.title: Perry Stone
programme.desc: Religious teachings from Perry Stone.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bandits of El Dorado
programme.desc: The Durango Kid fakes a murder in the hopes of learning how fugitives escape across the Mexican border.

programme.title: Smoke Signal
programme.desc: An Army deserter (Dana Andrews) and his girlfriend (Piper Laurie) shoot Grand Canyon rapids with his cavalry captors, chased by Indians.

programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Lawman Wyatt Earp (Burt Lancaster) and gunfighter John "Doc" Holliday (Kirk Douglas) find themselves together again in Tombstone, Ariz., despite the tumultuous history between them. Earp comes to Arizona on a mission to bring the Clayton clan to justice. Meanwhile, Holliday becomes incensed with the decision of Kate Fisher (Jo Van Fleet) to turn him down in favor of another gunfighter (John Ireland), ultimately leading Holliday to join Earp's side in a confrontation with the Claytons.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock, a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans. As McLintock tries to juggle his various adversaries, his wife, who left him two years previously, suddenly returns. But she isn't interested in her husband -- she wants custody of their daughter.

programme.title: Blood Alley
programme.desc: Chinese villagers free a merchant marine captain (John Wayne) from the communists to take them to Hong Kong in a stern-wheeler.

programme.title: Designing Woman
programme.desc: Sports reporter Mike (Gregory Peck) and clothes designer Marilla (Lauren Bacall) meet and fall in love while on vacation. They marry on a whim, only to come to the shocking realization that they have very little in common. Mike is a blue-collar sports fanatic. Marilla is a high-society fashion diva. But when Mike writes a tell-all piece about a boxing promoter (Edward Platt) with mob ties, they have to overcome their differences to save both their relationship and Mike's life.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: Journeying from Mexico back home to West Texas, mercenary Tom Buchanan (Randolph Scott) takes a break for the night in the border town of Agry. He soon discovers that almost every resident -- from the crooked sheriff (Barry Kelley) to the shifty-eyed innkeeper -- is a member of the prominent Agry family. When Buchanan defends Juan de la Vega (Manuel Rojas), a young man about to be lynched for shooting the town drunk, he himself is accused of murder and must struggle to escape town alive.

programme.title: Smoke Signal
programme.desc: An Army deserter (Dana Andrews) and his girlfriend (Piper Laurie) shoot Grand Canyon rapids with his cavalry captors, chased by Indians.

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A distinguished scientist is behaving very oddly, his faithful dog attacks him, and his daughter is terrified.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Deputy Marshal
programme.desc: A lawman (Jon Hall) tracks bank robbers to Wyoming and gets wind of a railroad-land scam.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt arrests the McLowery brothers, only to watch another sheriff lets them go.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The wife of a man in prison claims her husband was framed by Sheriff Behan.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When Wyatt saves Old Man Clanton's life, he responds by starting a smear campaign against Wyatt.

programme.title: Blood Alley
programme.desc: Chinese villagers free a merchant marine captain (John Wayne) from the communists to take them to Hong Kong in a stern-wheeler.

programme.title: Designing Woman
programme.desc: Sports reporter Mike (Gregory Peck) and clothes designer Marilla (Lauren Bacall) meet and fall in love while on vacation. They marry on a whim, only to come to the shocking realization that they have very little in common. Mike is a blue-collar sports fanatic. Marilla is a high-society fashion diva. But when Mike writes a tell-all piece about a boxing promoter (Edward Platt) with mob ties, they have to overcome their differences to save both their relationship and Mike's life.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Three brothers become outlaws after the Civil War, while a fourth sibling goes to work for the railroad.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: Journeying from Mexico back home to West Texas, mercenary Tom Buchanan (Randolph Scott) takes a break for the night in the border town of Agry. He soon discovers that almost every resident -- from the crooked sheriff (Barry Kelley) to the shifty-eyed innkeeper -- is a member of the prominent Agry family. When Buchanan defends Juan de la Vega (Manuel Rojas), a young man about to be lynched for shooting the town drunk, he himself is accused of murder and must struggle to escape town alive.

programme.title: The First Traveling Saleslady
programme.desc: In 1897 New York, Rose Gillray (Ginger Rogers) struggles to keep her corset business afloat. When Rose suggests that singer Molly Wade (Carol Channing) wear her daring new corset in her revue, the show is shut down. In debt to steel manufacturer Jim Carter (David Brian), Rose declares she can sell steel wire to stubborn cattle ranchers in Texas and clear her debt. Along the way, Rose is joined by Molly, inventor Charles Masters (Barry Nelson) and cattle baron Joel Kingdom (James Arness).

programme.title: Murder, He Says
programme.desc: When a public opinion surveyor working in the mountain district town of Plainville goes missing, fellow surveyor Pete Marshall (Fred MacMurray) is sent as his replacement. Visiting the hillbilly family of Mamie Fleagle (Marjorie Main), Pete begins to suspect with horror that she and her two sons have murdered the surveyor. Pete then comes to believe that Mamie is slowly poisoning wealthy Grandma Fleagle, who has put a vital clue to her fortune in a nonsensical embroidered sampler.

programme.title: David and Bathsheba
programme.desc: King David and the beautiful Bathsheba's adulterous love risks David his throne, country and even the wrath of God. Told in occasional flashback, the film sees him conquer Goliath and lead his armies to victory before the prophet Nathan brings the word of Jehovah and His judgment, which sees David atone for his sins.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Three brothers become outlaws after the Civil War, while a fourth sibling goes to work for the railroad.

programme.title: The Fatal Mallet
programme.desc: Three men play dirty tricks to charm a beautiful young woman.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The Goodways drift out to sea on a swan-shaped float and need rescue from a flock of real swans aiming to protect the giant inflatable; Mayor Humdinger steals Katie's Portable Pet Wash and ends up causing bubble trouble all over town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Humdinger tries to sabotage the Air Rescue Pups' Air Show; Uncle Otis' powerful magnetic drone goes rogue and starts picking up every metal object in sight.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay and takes all of the town's treasures, the Mighty Pups team up with new superpals, the Mighty Twins, to save the day -- and Mayor Goodway.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Things go wrong for Mr. Porter and Winnie Winnington at the orienteering relay in Yellowbone National Park; Mayor Goodway invites her friend Helga Humdinger and her rival Mayor Humdinger to City Hall for afternoon tea.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Danny's rocket-boosted pogo stick accidentally causes a fire; it's up to the entire Air Rescue team to save Danny and stop the forest from going up in flames; when Francois' big stunt show goes horribly awry, the Air Rescue pups are on a roll.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble and Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear; when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy; Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The Mighty Pups get charged up to take on new superbaddie the Copycat; it will take all-new powers and gear to take down their most formidable foe to date.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger transforms his robot cat Meow-Meow into a tiger-sized metal-eating menace, the PAW Patrol calls in the Cat Pack for help with stopping the creature.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Plankton must work together to survive an island of deadly monsters; SpongeBob teaches Patrick how to ride a bike.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Two familiar faces from SpongeBob's past visit; Plankton finds an unlikely ally in the sewers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't drive, but he learns one does not need a license to operate a self-driving car; Patrick thinks he is an old man, so SpongeBob tries to remind him how much fun being a child can be.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitive nature; SpongeBob pulls from Squidward's shirt a loose string that never seems to end.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Quasar uses Patrick to communicate with Aliens; Patrick and Grandpa have a contest about staring off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob decides to clean up Bikini Bottom; the Krusty Crew take on cafeteria duty at Pearl's school.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets ready for a hot date, but SpongeBob and Patrick give him a little more help than he needs; Plankton becomes a ghost to steal the secret formula; he requires a few lessons from the Flying Dutchman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: At a sprawling Texas ranch, a mysterious young man nicknamed Cooncat (John Barrymore Jr.) tells rancher Horse Davis (Basil Ruysdael) an improbable story about a murder at a nearby trading post. His descriptions of the men he believes committed the crime, Smiling Man (Jack Elam) and Roper (Dave Kashner), fit those of two members of a rival family who were killed during a land fight years earlier. Another shooting draws Horse's future son-in-law, Pat Farrell (John Archer), into the mystery.

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: When rancher and single mother of two Maggie Gilkeson (Cate Blanchett) sees her teenage daughter, Lily (Evan Rachel Wood), kidnapped by Apache rebels, she reluctantly accepts the help of her estranged father, Samuel (Tommy Lee Jones), in tracking down the kidnappers. programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S01 E24 The Stranger As Ben prepares to run for governor, Joe must come to his rescue when a disabled police officer from New Orleans comes to arrest Ben on a 20-year-old murder charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E06 Eight Hours to Die Mark is kidnapped by a man who blames Lucas for his own son's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E07 Duel of Honor An Italian count arrives in North Fork and challenges the town bully to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E08 The Safe Guard A new bank in North Fork is in danger of being robbed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E09 The Sister Mark tries to play Cupid for his father and a pretty young stranger who arrives in town.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S07 E06 Keep Them Doggies Rollin' The cowboys make a second attempt at rounding up their neighbor's unruly herd; everyone pitches in to help Booger pull off an old-fashioned cattle drive right through the center of town; Grandma gives all of the wives a lesson in cowgirl cooking.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S07 E07 Northern Exposure The cowboys partner with a successful rancher in northern Alabama; Misty mentors a junior barrel racer; Bubba trains his new ranch horses in hopes of selling them at a profit; Booger decides to cook up something special for his grandma.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S04 E32 The Executioner A former friend of Lucas' is released from prison and asks him for a job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E03 Lou Mallory Lou Mallory, a stunning redhead, arrives in North Fork and buys the hotel.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S01 E01 War of the Silver Kings Bret establishes himself as a high-stakes gambler in a Western town.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E11 John Wesley Hardin: Killer on the Texas Frontier When outlaw John Wesley Hardin murders a sheriff, a hard-charging Texas Ranger joins forces with a cool-headed police detective to hunt the killer; the unlikely duo must learn how to work together to end Hardin's criminal career once and for all.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E06 Wong Fee Lee Stakes His Claim Chinese immigrant Wong Fee Lee joins a convoy of miners headed to Deadwood where he hopes to strike gold and start a business; when the Black Hills Bandits stand in their way, Wong must find the strength to lead his fellow prospectors in battle.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E03 Fool's Gold Jim Bridger and his fellow trappers believe they are near El Dorado, the mythical Spanish city of gold, when they discover a river filled with gold, but their insatiable greed turns friends into enemies and puts Bridger at risk of a gruesome fate.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E04 A Prince on the Prairie While guiding a hunting expedition, Jim Bridger must deal with an arrogant foreign prince who is abusing his servant boy; the tables soon turn when it's the prince who needs rescuing, and his only hope is the long-suffering servant boy.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S01 E23 Gathering Clouds The Kid (Ty Miller) finds himself secretly helping the Army learn the identity of the Hawk. David Soul guest stars.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S01 E04 Ghost Rider Maverick's traveling companion disappears.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S01 E13 Star in the Dust The losers of a poker game challenge Cheyenne to a duel.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S01 E25 Escape to the Ponderosa Adam is taken hostage by a band of U.S. Army prisoners who have escaped and sought refuge on the Ponderosa.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E10 New Orleans Menace A criminal threatens to harm Mark unless Lucas sells him the ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E11 The Apprentice Sheriff A young man takes over the duties of the sheriff, who is out of town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E12 The Angry Gun Lucas and Mark are robbed while riding the stage back from a cattle sale.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E13 The Young Englishman Lucas suspects a nobleman, recently arrived from England, of cattle rustling.

programme.title: Doc West
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for a poker game gone bad, gunslinger Doc West finds himself in the local town jail. When a battle among the townspeople breaks out, he must choose sides.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E04 Quiet Night, Deadly Night Lucas and several others are trapped in the hotel with a dangerous outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E05 Death Never Rides Alone A former gunfighter arrives in North Fork with the intention of settling down.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E06 I Take This Woman A charming Irishman claims Lou for his bride.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S05 E07 The Assailants Lucas gets wind of an assassination plot.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E09 Law Comes to No Man's Land Marshal Chris Madsen helps newly appointed judge John Buford bring law and order to Oklahoma's Panhandle in an area known as No Man's Land; after escorting a wagon train of prisoners to Beaver City, they set up their first courthouse inside a saloon.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S04 E12 The Battle of Stone Corral When bandits rob a train and gun down a pursuing marshal, they spark one of the largest manhunts in California history; after taking shelter behind the crumbling walls of Stone Corral, they make their final stand against a hail of gunfire.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E07 Molly's Choice A young Jim Bridger helps a Shoshone woman escape the clutches of her abusive husband; as Bridger squares off against the frontier ruffian and his henchmen, he soon realizes that the woman he is helping is none other than the legendary Sacajawea.

programme.title: The Tall Tales of Jim Bridger
programme.desc: S01 E08 The Snakeroot Cure When a young girl is bitten by a rattlesnake, mountain man Jim Bridger finds himself in a race against time to save her arm and keep her alive as he desperately searches the wilderness for a medicinal plant that once saved the life of his friend.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S01 E24 Gathering Clouds The men of the Pony Express find themselves taking different sides as the start of the Civil War approaches.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S01 E05 The Long Hunt Bret tries to clear an innocent man of murder charges, even though the man is serving a life sentence.

programme.title: Cavalry Charge
programme.desc: Divided by the Civil War, two brothers (Ronald Reagan, Bruce Bennett) reunite against Apaches in Arizona.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S01 E09 A Good Day to Die A Sioux brave who claims to be innocent is denied justice when brought to trial for an Indian massacre.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S01 E10 The End of the Innocence Hickok and Emma (Josh Brolin, Melissa Leo) face hostile Indians and a ruthless commanding officer (James Sutorius) at a remote Army post.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean
programme.desc: Judge Mablean Ephriam, who presided over "Divorce Court" from 1999-2006 as the first star of the revived version of the show, returns to the courtroom genre with his half-hour series that deals with life and the law. The former Los Angeles-based prosecutor takes on the typical cases that are found on TV court shows. The arbitrator says that her show "will be life because everything we do, it involves the law."

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross
programme.desc: Americans just can't get enough courtroom drama, as is evidenced by yet another addition into the daytime court show fray. Former judge and prosecutor Kevin Ross adjudicates real cases, in which he tries to show litigants alternative ways of dealing with their issues and make them consider the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett
programme.desc: Judge Glenda Hatchett presided over her self-titled courtroom show from 2000-2008. Now, she returns to the medium with "The Verdict." In the half-hour series, the Atlanta native and former juvenile-court judge rules over small-claims cases brought in front of her. Hatchett's courtroom isn't just about finding someone guilty, though. She also uses her experience dealing with young people and her tough-love approach to help send a message to out-of-control juvenile offenders to try to set them on the right track in their lives.

programme.title: Supreme Justice With Judge Karen
programme.desc: Karen Mills was a county court judge and criminal defense attorney in Florida before turning to TV to preside over her own court shows. In her third effort, "Supreme Justice," Mills tackles small-claims court arbitrations in her compassionate way, to which viewers of her previous shows have grown accustomed. As usual with court shows, cases involve friendships gone bad, money disputes and property damage.

programme.desc: (1957) Classic western with Glenn Ford and Van Heflin. The capture of a murderous stagecoach robber propels an impoverished local rancher on a perilous journey. Directed by Delmer Daves.

programme.title: The Lady Eve
programme.desc: (1941) Screwball romcom with Barbara Stanwyck and Henry Fonda. A con artist is forced to change tack when she falls for her mark and he dumps her for trying to con him in the first place.

programme.title: Jubal
programme.desc: (1956) Western with Glenn Ford, Ernest Borgnine, Rod Steiger and Valerie French. A cowboy is given a job by a rancher, sparking lethal jealousy in a colleague and desire in the boss's wife.

programme.title: Romancing the Stone
programme.desc: (1984) Comedy action adventure starring Michael Douglas and Kathleen Turner. An adventurer helps a bestselling author to search for her sister, who's been kidnapped in Colombia.

programme.title: Memory
programme.desc: (2022) Action with Liam Neeson as a septuagenarian hitman; Monica Bellucci as a villain who hires hitmen to hit him, and Guy Pearce as an FBI agent investigating it all.

programme.title: American Woman
programme.desc: (2018) Emotional drama starring Sienna Miller. A woman must raise her grandson after her daughter disappears. With Christina Hendricks and Aaron Paul.

programme.title: Sweat
programme.desc: (2020) Polish drama. An unusually authentic viral video changes everything for a social media fitness influencer whose confident online persona masks her vulnerability. In Polish/subs.
